title: cPanel security advisory (AV26-499)
description: On May 21, 2026, cPanel published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: cPanel & WebHost Manager (WHM) software   version 11.126.0.63 and later, version 11.134.0.30 and later, version 11.136.0.14 and later, WP Squared 11.138.1.1 and later
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
